---
name: Legal or policy note
about: Add a sourced legal, policy, procurement, licensing, or governance note.
title: "[Policy] "
labels: policy, needs source
assignees: ""
---

## Topic

What legal, policy, procurement, licensing, or governance question should this note address?

## Jurisdiction or institution

Name the relevant EU, national, regional, institutional, or program context.

## Sources

Link primary sources where possible: regulations, official guidance, program documents, procurement rules, or license text.

## Practical implication

Explain what this changes for open AI work, benchmarks, compute access, model release, or documentation.

## Limitations

This project does not provide legal advice. What should readers avoid assuming?

## Definition of done

- [ ] Primary sources are linked where available.
- [ ] The note distinguishes law, policy, interpretation, and project recommendation.
- [ ] Jurisdiction-specific assumptions are clear.
- [ ] The note avoids confidential or privileged information.
